title: Les démons de l'aube
writer: Maurice Aubergé, Yves Allégret, Jean Ferry
actors: Georges Marchal, André Valmy, Dominique Nohain
plot: Somewhere in Tunisia, commandos of the First French Army are training, in preparation for the August 1945 landings on the southern coast of France. Lt. Claude Legrand (Georges Marchal), who leads the commando, finds among his men ...
